Question: Which of the following three specified operative episodes has the lowest composite morbidity rate: (1) the open midline laparotomy with multilayer fascial closure for OperativeEpisode-OR-2024-NEPH-0001 in a patient with ASA III chronic pulmonary disease on home oxygen therapy, (2) the minimally invasive transabdominal laparoscopic intraperitoneal resection for OperativeEpisode-OR-2024-ENT-076 in a patient classified ASA IIIe (emergency operation with severe systemic disease), or (3) the endovascular percutaneous retrograde stent deployment for OperativeEpisode-OR-2022-CARD-045 in a patient with ASA II metabolic syndrome with obesity and controlled type 2 diabetes?
SQL Query: SELECT MIN(CompositeMorbidityRate) AS CompositeMorbidityRate FROM (SELECT CompositeMorbidityRate AS CompositeMorbidityRate FROM PostoperativeOutcomeRegistry WHERE OperativeEpisodeID = "OperativeEpisode-OR-2024-NEPH-0001 procedural encounter logged in perioperative registry" AND SurgicalApproachPhenotype = "open midline laparotomy with multilayer fascial closure technique" AND ASAphysiologyStratum = "ASA III chronic pulmonary disease on home oxygen therapy respiratory comorbidity" UNION ALL SELECT CompositeMorbidityRate AS CompositeMorbidityRate FROM PostoperativeOutcomeRegistry WHERE OperativeEpisodeID = "OperativeEpisode-OR-2024-ENT-076 transoral robotic microdissection procedural entry" AND SurgicalApproachPhenotype = "minimally invasive transabdominal laparoscopic intraperitoneal resection technique" AND ASAphysiologyStratum = "ASA IIIe — emergency operation with severe systemic disease annotated with 'e' modifier" UNION ALL SELECT CompositeMorbidityRate AS CompositeMorbidityRate FROM PostoperativeOutcomeRegistry WHERE OperativeEpisodeID = "OperativeEpisode-OR-2022-CARD-045 hybrid cardiac procedure recorded in surgical logbook" AND SurgicalApproachPhenotype = "endovascular percutaneous retrograde stent deployment procedure" AND ASAphysiologyStratum = "ASA II metabolic syndrome with obesity and controlled type 2 diabetes phenotype");
